sizing_rule.note: Risk 2% of equity per trade (1-R unit). Scale position size up by 1.25x when equity increases 1.5%+ above baseline. Cap individual positions at 5% of portfolio to maintain consistent risk exposure across all holdings.

source_rule_text: A trader should adjust position size proportionally to account equity changes and risk per trade, equalizing risk exposure across all portfolio positions to maintain consistent 1-R risk units.
